test-method.name: testSearchWithValidQuery
test-method.description: Search for 'Selenium WebDriver' and verify results

test-method.name: testSearchWithDifferentKeyword
test-method.description: Search for 'Java Programming' and verify results

exception.message: Results should be displayed for 'Java Programming' search expected [true] but found [false]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Results should be displayed for 'Java Programming' search expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at tests.GoogleSearchTest.testSearchWithDifferentKeyword(GoogleSearchTest.java:81) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DirectMethodHandleAccessor.invoke(DirectMethodHandleAccessor.java:103) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodInvocationHelper.invokeMethod(MethodInvocationHelper.java:139) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeMethod(TestInvoker.java:664) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethod(TestInvoker.java:228) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodRunner.runInSequence(MethodRunner.java:63) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker$MethodInvocationAgent.invoke(TestInvoker.java:961) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethods(TestInvoker.java:201) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.invokeTestMethods(TestMethodWorker.java:148) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.run(TestMethodWorker.java:128) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at org.testng.TestRunner.privateRun(TestRunner.java:819) at org.testng.TestRunner.run(TestRunner.java:619) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.runTest(SuiteRunner.java:443) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.runSequentially(SuiteRunner.java:437) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.privateRun(SuiteRunner.java:397) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.run(SuiteRunner.java:336) at org.testng.SuiteRunnerWorker.runSuite(SuiteRunnerWorker.java:52) at org.testng.SuiteRunnerWorker.run(SuiteRunnerWorker.java:95) at org.testng.TestNG.runSuitesSequentially(TestNG.java:1301) at org.testng.TestNG.runSuitesLocally(TestNG.java:1228) at org.testng.TestNG.runSuites(TestNG.java:1134) at test-method.name: testSearchQueryInURL
test-method.description: Verify URL contains search query parameter

exception.message: First search should have results expected [true] but found [false]

test-method.name: testSearchWithSpecialCharacters
test-method.description: Search with special characters and verify results

test-method.name: testPageRefreshAfterSearch
test-method.description: Verify page can be refreshed after search

exception.message: Results should be displayed before refresh expected [true] but found [false]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Results should be displayed before refresh expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at test-method.name: testSearchCaseInsensitive
test-method.description: Verify Google search is case insensitive

test-method.name: testCurrentURLAfterSearch
test-method.description: Verify URL is updated with search query

test-method.name: testPageTitleAfterSearch
test-method.description: Verify page title contains search query

test-method.name: testResultsCountNotEmpty
test-method.description: Verify results count is displayed and not empty

test-method.name: testBackNavigationAfterSearch
test-method.description: Verify browser back button works after search
